overall_comment: Both required artifacts present and publication-ready: results.png is a clean 2x3 multi-panel that passes the 10-second skim test (metric -20 clearly annotated via dashed reference, bar labels, and panel titles) and narrative.png is a legible 4-step deterministic-construction schematic. Only cosmetic MINORs worth tightening next pass.

issues.issue: Panel labels (d)(e)(f) embedded in titles but missing bold top-left style-guide label.
Palette uses default matplotlib blue/orange rather than style-guide seaborn-muted hex set.
issues.fix: Define COLORS dict with style.md palette and reuse.

issues.issue: Panel (b) inline legend slightly crowds seed-1 bars.
Panel (a) shows 1D partition but uses full y-axis ticked 0.0..0.9, looks odd.
issues.fix: Hide yticks or relabel as 'pair id'.

issues.issue: Panel titles use embedded '(a) Step 1: ...' prefix instead of separate bold labels at (-0.12, 1.05).
issues.fix: Move letters to ax.text calls; keep 'Step N:' as plain title.
